title: Part 4 – Exposé : message d'accueil téléphonique
instructions: Écoutez le message, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Thank you for calling Vertex Consulting. Our office hours are Monday through Friday, from eight thirty in the morning to six in the evening. If you know your party's extension, please dial it now. For sales inquiries, press one. For billing and accounts, press two. For technical support, press three. To speak with a receptionist, please press zero or stay on the line. If you are calling outside of business hours, please leave a message after the tone and we will return your call on the next business day. To repeat these options, press nine.

questions.prompt: What kind of recording is this?
questions.explanation: C'est un menu téléphonique automatisé avec des options numérotées.

questions.prompt: Which number should a caller press to reach billing?
What should callers do if they call outside business hours?
choices: Press zero to speak to someone
Leave a message after the tone
questions.explanation: "please leave a message after the tone and we will return your call on the next business day".
